nasb.text: But David could not go before it to inquire of God, for he was terrified by the sword of the angel of the Lord.

esv.text: but David could not go before it to inquire of God, for he was afraid of the sword of the angel of the Lord.

cnv.text: 只是大衛不敢上去求問　神，因為懼怕耶和華使者的刀。

ccb.text: 但大卫因为惧怕耶和华天使的刀，不敢去那里求问上帝。
